content:
# Noise Log

**Summary**: A logging technique that detects high-frequency sounds generated by fluid movement through leaks or holes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014]] used noise logs to confirm leak locations identified in temperature and corrosion surveys.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- If noise survey... is greater than or equal to the maximum readable frequency from surface to bottom divided by two, then this will support both temperature and corrosion surveys which will indicate the presence of leak. ([[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014, p. 36]])
